(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b6 on table, b7 on b6
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 10): b8 on table, then b9-b17 stacked
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 should be on top (but it's alone, so it stays on table)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 should be on top, b3 on table
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 should be on top, b5 on table
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 should be on top, b7 on table
      (on-table b7)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b8 on top, b17 on table, order reversed
      (on-table b17)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (clear b8)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10
    (on-table b7)

    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)

    (on b16 b15)
